feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAC Story fails to load on second open – “Communication with the remote system failed”
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’m facing an issue in SAP Analytics Cloud.
The story loads normally the first time, but when I close it and reopen it in the same SAC session, I get this error:

“Communication with the remote system failed.”

The story uses a Live Connection. 

Has anyone seen this behavior or knows what might cause it?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: SAC Excel Add-in – Error 2120042 when inserting calculated measures after latest update
entry.content:
In the SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) Excel Add-in, an error occurs when inserting a calculated measure from an SAC model into Excel.

As soon as a calculated measure is added to the worksheet, the following error message appears:

Caught exception: exception 2120042: An unexpected error occurred.
For further information on this error search SAP notes for one of the following tags:
loc=0xe1380be9e058eda0,
ctx=0x25fc6d6118426d2b.
If you don't find an according note, open a support ticket and include the trace files containing correlation id 0xdc63fface67a4b4c.

Key Observations:

  • Standard (non-calculated) measures can be inserted and used without any issues.

  • Calculated measures previously worked correctly in the Excel Add-in.

  • The issue started occurring after the latest SAC update.

Correlation ID:
0xdc63fface67a4b4c

Expected Behavior:
Calculated measures should be inserted and function correctly in the Excel Add-in, as they did before the latest SAC update.

entry.title: AND function in SAC is not working
entry.content:
hi @N1kh1l 

I need your help regarding this. I need to create a data action to validate the data and give the indicator (1,2,3,4)

condition:

If there are values from headcount and salary assumptions = 1

If there are no values from both headcount and salary assumptions = 2

If there are values from headcount but no values from salary assumptions = 3

If there are values from salary assumptions but no values from headcount = 4

and here is my logic :

IF RESULTLOOKUP(
[d/Measures] = "HEADCOUNT",
[d/DIM_MANPOWER_BUDGET_ITEM] = "A5000_001",
[d/DIM_CURRENCY] = "#"
   ) != NULL AND
RESULTLOOKUP(
[d/Measures] = "AMT_DC",
[d/DIM_MANPOWER_BUDGET_ITEM] = "A5000_003"
) != NULL THEN
DATA(
[d/Measures] = "VALIDATION",
[d/DIM_MANPOWER_BUDGET_ITEM] = "A5000_205",
[d/DIM_CURRENCY] = "#",
[d/Date] = [d/Version].[p/M1Y1]
) = 1
ENDIF
 
// Need Attention Indicator for Special Payment Assumptions
IF RESULTLOOKUP(
[d/Measures] = "HEADCOUNT",
[d/DIM_MANPOWER_BUDGET_ITEM] = "A5000_001",
[d/DIM_CURRENCY] = "#"
   ) = NULL AND
RESULTLOOKUP(
[d/Measures] = "AMT_DC",
[d/DIM_MANPOWER_BUDGET_ITEM] = "A5000_003"
) = NULL THEN
DATA(
[d/Measures] = "VALIDATION",
[d/DIM_MANPOWER_BUDGET_ITEM] = "A5000_205",
[d/DIM_CURRENCY] = "#",
[d/Date] = [d/Version].[p/M1Y1]
) = 2
ENDIF
 
// Need Assumption Indicator for Special Payment Assumptions
IF RESULTLOOKUP(
[d/Measures] = "HEADCOUNT",
[d/DIM_MANPOWER_BUDGET_ITEM] = "A5000_001",
[d/DIM_CURRENCY] = "#"
   ) != NULL AND
RESULTLOOKUP(
[d/Measures] = "AMT_DC",
[d/DIM_MANPOWER_BUDGET_ITEM] = "A5000_003"
) = NULL THEN
DATA(
[d/Measures] = "VALIDATION",
[d/DIM_MANPOWER_BUDGET_ITEM] = "A5000_205",
[d/DIM_CURRENCY] = "#",
[d/Date] = [d/Version].[p/M1Y1]
) = 3
ENDIF
 
// Need Headcount Indicator for Special Payment Assumptions
IF RESULTLOOKUP(
[d/Measures] = "AMT_DC",
[d/DIM_MANPOWER_BUDGET_ITEM] = "A5000_003"
) != NULL AND
RESULTLOOKUP(
[d/Measures] = "HEADCOUNT",
[d/DIM_MANPOWER_BUDGET_ITEM] = "A5000_001",
[d/DIM_CURRENCY] = "#"
   ) = NULL THEN
DATA(
[d/Measures] = "VALIDATION",
[d/DIM_MANPOWER_BUDGET_ITEM] = "A5000_205",
[d/DIM_CURRENCY] = "#",
[d/Date] = [d/Version].[p/M1Y1]
) = 4
ENDIF

I'm getting an error from this. In some data, I expect to have the "1" indicator as a result, but it turns out "4". I'm worried that it's because the system only read the first condition in the logic. Please advise.

entry.title: Develop custom report in SAP S/4 HANA public cloud
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am currently working with SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Version 2602.0.59 and would like to develop a custom report within the system. Could you please guide me on the required steps to achieve this?

Any insights, best practices, or resources on how to approach this task in SAP S/4HANA Cloud would be greatly appreciated.

Looking forward to your responses!

Best regards,
Harshita

entry.title: SAC: Story fails to connect when opening from URL
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

A client can open and consume a story normally when he opens the story from the folder where it is located.

When he opens the story using a URL link, an error pops up: Cannot connect to BW system...

He tried, with equal results, these two URLs to the story:

- the one I copied for him from the "share" option of the story (URL ending with the story's UID)

- the one he copied from the browser when successfully opening the story from the folder (ending with [story UID]/?mode=view)

We need direct links to the story (used to open from Fiori).

Any idea what could be the problem?

Thanks for your inputs!

Stéphane

entry.title: Custom hierarchy order in Data Analyzer (SAP Analytics Cloud)?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

in SAP Analytics Cloud I can define a custom hierarchy order in a Story when I am in Edit mode.

 

However, in the Data Analyzer I only see the following options for hierarchies:

  • Ascending
  • Descending
  • Default order

My question is:

Is it possible to define a custom hierarchy order directly in the Data Analyzer, similar to what is possible in Story Edit mode?

If not, is there any workaround planned or recommended?

Thanks a lot in advance!

Best regards
T’hami

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud - Transport only Import/Upload-Jobs into Target Tenant
entry.content:
Hi Friends

Is there a way on how to only transport the Import/Upload-Jobs of a Model into the Target Tenant?

Kind regards,

Ismail

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud - Transport only Import/Upload-Jobs into Target Tenant
entry.content:
Hi Friends

Is there a way on how to only transport Import/Upload-Jobs to the Target Tenant?

Kind regards,

Ismail

entry.title: Dynamic Closing Month in SAC (BW Import Model)
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I’m working with a BW Query-based Import Model in SAP Analytics Cloud and I’m facing a design challenge related to time handling.

Business Requirement

We have two different visualization needs within the same story:

  1. Numeric point charts (KPI tiles)
    → Should always display values for a selected “Reporting Month” (Closing Month).

  2. Bar charts (Trend analysis)
    → Should display performance for the last 13 months relative to the selected Closing Month
    (i.e., Closing Month - 12 months up to Closing Month).

Important Constraint

The “Closing Month” is not always Current Month - 1.

Due to operational timing (e.g., delayed invoicing), the closing month is effectively the latest available month in the dataset, which may vary over time.

Additionally:

  • Users must be able to override the Closing Month at runtime
    (e.g., instead of December 2025, they may select November 2025).

  • This selection should:

    • Update KPI tiles to reflect the selected month.

    • Dynamically adjust the bar chart to show the rolling 13-month window relative to that selection (e.g., Nov 2024 – Nov 2025).

Current Approach

Currently, I am:

  • Using a Story Variable for Reporting Month.

  • Programmatically setting filters for widgets based on that variable via scripting.

This works functionally, but:

  • It feels performance-intensive.

  • It introduces additional story scripting complexity.

Question

Within the constraints of a BW Import Model, what would be the recommended architectural approach to:

  • Support a dynamic “Closing Month” selection,

  • Drive both single-month KPIs and rolling 13-month trend charts,

  • Minimize scripting and optimize performance?

Any best practices or design recommendations would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you!

Onur

entry.title: Optimized Story – Advanced Filter can’t select GL/Account (Account-based model) to exclude Cost Cent
entry.content:
Hi all,
I’m working in SAP Analytics Cloud (Optimized Story) with an account-based planning model.

I need to exclude a specific combination (tuple) of Cost Center + GL/Account from a table, while keeping all GL accounts included for all other cost centers.

Problem: In Advanced Filter (Set Conditions), I can select dimensions like Cost Center, but GL/Account doesn’t appear in the dimension list, so I can’t define a tuple condition involving both.

Has anyone faced this in Optimized Stories with account-based models?

  • Is this expected behavior / a known limitation?

  • What is the recommended way to handle tuple-based exclusion in this scenario?

entry.title: Edit Date via Date Action
entry.content:
Dear community,

I need to perform a Data Action on SAC using advanced formulas. I have the following model:

DIMENSION

  • Billing Date
  • Plan Date
  • Company
  • Liquidity Item

MEASURE

  • Payment Day
  • Amount

‘Billing Date’ (Day granularity), ‘Payment day’ (integer) ‘Plan Date’ (Day granularity set to 0000)

I need to calculate the Plan date as follows:

Plan Date = Billing Date + Payment Day

 

I tried the NEXT formula, but without success. How can I achieve this desired result?

Thanks

SAP Analytics Cloud

entry.title: SAC :How to count a Dimension based on measure value ?
entry.content:
Hi everyone

does anyone know how is possibile to count a dimension ( like eg. customer) based on measure value ( like revenue > 10k eg.) ?

I know how to create an aggregate measure based on dimensione value but not if is possible aggregate based on value measure 

tks

entry.title: Queries and CDS in SAP SAC
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have two questions regarding the standard queries that we want to use in SAC live models:

  1. Is it possible to add a non-compounded key display for the G/L Account to the standard query "2CCFIFINSTMTCMP - Balance Sheet/Income Statement - Multidimensional" (like in Trial Balance)? Currently, only the compounded key is available in the attributes once loaded into SAC.

SAC:

Fiori:

Trial balance in Fiori:

2. We would like to create a Trial Balance report in SAC using "C_PL_StRpGLAcctTrialBalItmQry - GL Account Trial Balance Query – Poland," but we cannot find dedicated query in the SAC query base. Is it available in SAC?

entry.title: Cascading Effect between Inputs Controls is not working with Linked Analysis for different charts
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’m currently facing a limitation in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) while building a Story report, and I would like to share it here — both to confirm if others are experiencing the same issue and to ask for your support.

The Scenario:

In our project, the customer requires cascading behavior between Input Controls that are connected to different charts using Linked Analysis.

The expected behavior would be:

  • Input Control A filters Chart A
  • Input Control B filters Chart B
  • And selections in one control should cascade and dynamically restrict the available values in the other control

However, according to SAP Help:

“There is no cascading effect between group filters that affect different sets of widgets.”

So even when Linked Analysis is configured, cascading does not work if the input controls affect different widget sets.

The Impact:

This limitation makes it impossible to implement a very common reporting requirement:

  • Dependent dropdown filters
  • Context-driven selections across different sections of a Story
  • Controlled and guided user navigation experience

For customers coming from BW/BO or other BI tools, this behavior is often expected as standard.

Existing Improvement Request:

There is already an Improvement Request submitted to SAP for this functionality.

However, for the request to be reviewed by SAP Product Management, it must receive at least 25 votes from different customers/companies.

Without enough votes, the request will not move forward for evaluation.

Call for Support:

If you:

  • Have faced the same limitation
  • Believe this functionality would improve SAC usability
  • Or simply want to support the enhancement

Please consider voting for the improvement request.

The more visibility and votes it receives, the higher the chance SAP will analyze and potentially prioritize it.

The link to vote in this request are: Request 

Let’s see if we can reach the required 25 votes and bring this topic to SAP’s attention.

Thanks in advance for your support!

entry.title: How to combine a pop-up result with onBeforeExecute?
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm trying to use a popup to decide if a data upload job executes or not, the code looks like this:

ScriptVariable_Proceed is a boolean global variable (false by default). The thing is that the code enters into the pop-up but continues executing, so basically it's not waiting to come back from the pop-up to continue the execution.

Is there a way I can acomplish this? 

Thanks!

entry.title: Set visible dependent on selected members in Input Control using SAC script
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am using an input control in SAC for dimension "Country" (Single Selection) and would like to display specific images depending on the selected Country.

1. Is this possible using an onSelect script on my input control, or do I need to read from a table?

2. How can I read the selected member from an input control or table?

3. How do I use setVisible to display the correct image?

 

Looking forward to your support,

Anu

 

#sacapplicationdesigner #scripting #sapanalyticscloud

entry.title: SAC: custom order of measures in tables with linked dimensions
entry.content:
Hello community,

I have the case, that I want to use a table with a primary model and two linked models (linkage happens via linked dimensions) but I can't arrange the measures in a specific order (all three are live BW-models).

In the Builder of the table I can't rearrange the single measures, I can only move the whole set of measures at once. I can't sort the measures in there via drag and drop. Furthermore, it seems to be correct in the Builder (I renamed the dimensions, so that it's clear which should be the first, second and third):

But unfortunately, it's displayed in the wrong order:

When I only use one model, I can arrange the measures in a custom order via right clicking the dimension measures: 

But once I add the linked models, the option of sorting individually disappears:

What can I do to show the measures in my preferred order? In the Builder it seems to be correct and individual sorting does not work. Even the scrtipting says custom orders are not supported for members.

Any suggestions? Thanks!

entry.title: Lock Parent vs Leaf Members
entry.content:
Hi all,

I would like to ask whether the following is possible in SAC.

In my data model, I have a hierarchy within a generic dimension. In a table, I would like to lock only the parent member, while keeping all underlying child members open for input.

Is there a way to achieve this other than creating a styling rule?

entry.title: Use list of values from another version to target version in SAC data action
entry.content:
Hello All,

I have a requirement where i need to run a data action advance formula script on Target version based on the values from another version.

For Ex:

Version 1 is my source version from where I want list of values for DIMENSION 1 and Version 2 is my target version on which I am running the data action.

Version 1:

DIM1DIM2DIM3Measure
KR112DI112MP1129
KR113DI113MP1138
KR114DI114MP11410

 

Version 2:

DIM1DIM2DIM3Measure
KR112DI112MP1122
KR113DI113MP1133
KR114DI114MP1144
KR115DI115MP1155
KR116DI116MP1166
KR117DI117MP1177

I want to run a data action only on those value which is available in Version 1 for DIMENSION1. So let's say i want all values multiply by -1, then my desired outcome should be like this:

 

DIM1DIM2DIM3Measure
KR112DI112MP112-2
KR113DI113MP113-3
KR114DI114MP114-4
KR115DI115MP1155
KR116DI116MP1166
KR117DI117MP1177

Basically i would like to understand, how we can use the dimension members which is available in another version. Is that possible?

@N1kh1l @james_lim @William_Yu1 

Thanks

entry.title: Story not loading for a single user of SAC
entry.content:
Hi,

I cannot work with a story in SAC as it is not loading completely. This happens only to me and no other users of our analytics team.

When I run the story, the first page does not load completely as all the visualizations sourced from a particular live connection model do not load throwing a 'failed to fetch data' error. The second page charts do not load at all. When I go to Edit mode, the following errors are thrown:

'We cannot connect to your BW System ..............'

When I try to use the builder panel on the left to modify the story, I get the error:

'Builder is currently unable to access this datasource'

I have the same access permissions as that of my team members who do not face this problem. I have similar problem with some other stories in our environment as well which the other team members do not face.

Please suggest what could be going wrong and how I can narrow down to the root cause of this problem.
